moments.title: Commonwealth Games begin in Glasgow
moments.blurb: The 2026 Commonwealth Games, officially known as Glasgow 2026, kicks off today, July 23rd, with the Opening Ceremony in Glasgow, Scotland, running until August 2nd.

angles.name: Opening Ceremony buzz
angles.copy: The Commonwealth Games officially open in Glasgow today! Who's ready for 11 days of incredible sport and celebration right here in Scotland? #Glasgow2026

angles.name: Team UK support
angles.copy: It's here! The Commonwealth Games start today. We'll be cheering on all the athletes from across the UK and Commonwealth. What events are you most looking forward to?

moments.title: Formula 1 Hungarian Grand Prix
moments.blurb: Formula 1 heads to the Hungaroring this weekend for the Hungarian Grand Prix, with practice starting tomorrow, July 24th, leading up to Sunday's race.

angles.name: Race weekend kicks off
angles.copy: Lights out soon for the Hungarian Grand Prix! F1 practice starts tomorrow, leading into qualifying and Sunday's big race. Who are you backing for the win?

angles.name: Weekend plans
angles.copy: Your weekend soundtrack to the F1 Hungarian Grand Prix! Rev those engines, it's going to be a fast one.

moments.title: Latitude Festival underway
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival is happening now in Henham Park, Suffolk, from July 23-26, featuring a diverse lineup of music, comedy, and arts.

angles.name: Festival vibes
angles.copy: Latitude Festival is officially LIVE in Henham Park! Who's soaking up the sun and incredible acts this weekend in Suffolk? Tell us your highlights!

angles.name: Music and arts
angles.copy: From main stage anthems to hidden gems, Latitude Festival is delivering all the music and arts this weekend. Catching any of the action?

moments.title: Truck Festival kicks off
moments.blurb: The UK's longest-running independent music festival, Truck Festival, starts today in Oxfordshire and runs until July 26th.

angles.name: Indie festival start
angles.copy: Truck Festival is go! Kicking off today in Oxfordshire, it's set to be a massive weekend of indie and rock. Who's there?

angles.name: Weekend plans
angles.copy: Your weekend just got louder! Truck Festival is bringing the noise to Oxfordshire. Crank up the volume and join the party.

moments.title: WOMAD Festival is live
moments.blurb: The World of Music, Arts and Dance (WOMAD) Festival takes place from July 23-26, celebrating global cultures through music, dance, and workshops.

angles.name: Global sounds
angles.copy: WOMAD Festival is bringing the world to us this weekend! Celebrating music, arts, and dance from every corner of the globe. What's your favourite world music track?

angles.name: Festival of culture
angles.copy: Beyond the music, WOMAD is a feast for the senses! Dive into a weekend of global culture, food, and incredible performances.

moments.title: Bruno Mars continues Wembley residency
moments.blurb: Bruno Mars continues his series of shows at Wembley Stadium this week, with performances scheduled for July 24th and 25th.

angles.name: Wembley takeover
angles.copy: Bruno Mars is still bringing the 24K Magic to Wembley Stadium! If you're heading to his shows tomorrow or Saturday, get ready for a night of pure 🔥

angles.name: Hooligans in London
angles.copy: He's still got London in the palm of his hand! Bruno Mars continues his epic Wembley run. What's your favourite Bruno Mars track?

moments.title: Official UK Singles Chart update
moments.blurb: The Official UK Singles Chart will be updated tomorrow, Friday, July 24th, revealing the nation's new number one and top tracks.

angles.name: Chart prediction
angles.copy: Tomorrow's the day! The Official UK Singles Chart gets a refresh. Who do you think will be crowned the new number one?

angles.name: Friday new music
angles.copy: New music Friday means a new Official UK Singles Chart! Get ready to discover your new favourite track or see if your current obsession made it to the top.

moments.title: Love Island UK drama continues
moments.blurb: The 13th series of Love Island UK, which premiered on June 1st, continues to air nightly on ITV2 and ITVX, bringing daily villa drama throughout the summer.

angles.name: Daily villa updates
angles.copy: Another day, another dose of Love Island drama! What's got you talking from the villa today? Catch it tonight on ITV2 and ITVX.

angles.name: Summer guilty pleasure
angles.copy: Your summer guilty pleasure is still delivering! Love Island is ongoing, bringing all the recouplings and 'I've got a text!' moments. Who's your favourite islander?

moments.title: Happy 57th to Jennifer Lopez
moments.blurb: Global superstar Jennifer Lopez celebrates her 57th birthday tomorrow, July 24th, born in 1969.

angles.name: J-Lo birthday shout out
angles.copy: Tomorrow, we're celebrating the one and only Jennifer Lopez turning 57! Get ready for a playlist packed with her biggest hits. What's your J-Lo anthem?

angles.name: Iconic performer
angles.copy: From the block to global icon, Jennifer Lopez celebrates her birthday tomorrow! Still bringing the fire at 57. Which J-Lo track gets you on the dancefloor?

moments.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
moments.blurb: The legendary frontman of The Rolling Stones, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday on July 26th, born in 1943.

angles.name: Rock legend's birthday
angles.copy: Still rocking at 83! Mick Jagger celebrates his birthday on Sunday. What's your favourite Rolling Stones track to get you moving like Mick?

angles.name: Ageless icon
angles.copy: Can you believe Mick Jagger turns 83 this Sunday? The man is an absolute legend! Tune in for a Stones mini-mix to celebrate.

moments.title: Queen's Roger Taylor turns 77
moments.blurb: Roger Taylor, the iconic drummer for Queen, celebrates his 77th birthday on July 26th, born in 1949.

angles.name: Drummer's birthday
angles.copy: Happy 77th birthday to the legendary Roger Taylor of Queen this Sunday! The man behind some of rock's most iconic beats. What's your favourite Queen song to air drum to?

angles.name: Queen's beat
angles.copy: Celebrating the incredible talent of Roger Taylor this Sunday as he turns 77! Queen wouldn't be the same without him. Which Queen classic features his best drumming?

moments.title: UK Summer School Holidays are here
moments.blurb: Schools across England and Wales are now officially on summer holiday, with many having broken up around July 22nd-23rd, marking the start of the main holiday period.

angles.name: Holidays begin
angles.copy: School's OUT for summer! ☀️ The summer holidays have officially begun for many across the UK. What are your plans for the next few weeks?

angles.name: Local summer fun
angles.copy: Devon schools are now on summer break! Time for beach days, exploring the moors, and making memories. What local spots are on your summer bucket list?

angles.name: Welsh summer
angles.copy: Haf Hapus! Summer holidays have arrived in Wales. Whether it's the coast, castles or mountains, enjoy the break! What are your plans?

moments.title: AIG Women's Open at Royal Lytham & St Annes
moments.blurb: The AIG Women's Open, one of golf's major championships, tees off on July 29th and runs until August 2nd at Royal Lytham & St Annes in Lancashire.

angles.name: Major golf championship
angles.copy: Get ready for world-class golf! The AIG Women's Open starts next Wednesday at Royal Lytham & St Annes. Who do you think will lift the trophy?

angles.name: Lancashire golf
angles.copy: A major championship coming to our doorstep! The AIG Women's Open tees off next week in Lancashire. Will you be heading down to watch?

moments.title: T100 Triathlon London this weekend
moments.blurb: The T100 Triathlon comes to London this weekend, July 25-26, featuring elite triathletes competing in the capital.

angles.name: Triathlon in the capital
angles.copy: London is hosting the T100 Triathlon this weekend! Elite athletes will be swimming, cycling, and running through the city. Who's feeling inspired to get active?

angles.name: Weekend sporting event
angles.copy: Pushing the limits this weekend! The T100 Triathlon hits London. Tune in to see some incredible endurance and fierce competition.

moments.title: Summer Nights at the Bandstand begins
moments.blurb: Summer Nights at the Bandstand, a series of outdoor concerts in Glasgow, kicks off on July 27th and runs until August 15th, featuring a variety of artists.

angles.name: Glasgow summer music
angles.copy: Summer Nights at the Bandstand starts Monday in Glasgow! Get ready for some amazing outdoor concerts under the Scottish sky. Who are you hoping to see?

angles.name: Outdoor concert series
angles.copy: Enjoying the long summer evenings with live music! Summer Nights at the Bandstand kicks off next week. Perfect for a relaxed evening out.

moments.title: Paul Anka turns 85
moments.blurb: Legendary singer-songwriter Paul Anka celebrates his 85th birthday on July 30th, born in 1941.

angles.name: Classic crooner's birthday
angles.copy: Celebrating a true legend! Paul Anka turns 85 next Thursday. What's your favourite timeless hit from this incredible singer-songwriter?

angles.name: Timeless talent
angles.copy: From 'Diana' to 'My Way', Paul Anka has penned some of the greatest songs ever. Wishing him a very happy 85th birthday next week!

moments.title: Kate Bush celebrates 68th birthday
moments.blurb: The enigmatic and influential artist Kate Bush celebrates her 68th birthday on July 30th, born in 1958.

angles.name: Art pop icon's birthday
angles.copy: Running Up That Hill to celebrate! Kate Bush turns 68 next Thursday. A true visionary in music. What's your favourite Kate Bush track?

angles.name: Unique sound
angles.copy: Happy birthday to the incredible Kate Bush next week! Her unique sound has influenced generations. Which of her albums is your favourite?

moments.title: Gary Numan plays Halifax
moments.blurb: Synth-rock pioneer Gary Numan will perform at The Piece Hall in Halifax on July 31st.

angles.name: Numan in Yorkshire
angles.copy: Are you ready for some classic electronic rock? Gary Numan plays The Piece Hall in Halifax next Friday! What's your must-hear Numan track?

angles.name: Synth pioneer live
angles.copy: The electronic music legend Gary Numan is live in Halifax next week! Get ready for a night of iconic tracks. Which of his songs takes you back?

moments.title: Wilderness Festival starts next week
moments.blurb: The Audi presents Wilderness Festival returns to Oxfordshire from July 30th to August 2nd, offering a blend of music, arts, food, and wellbeing.

angles.name: Festival anticipation
angles.copy: Wilderness Festival is just around the corner, starting next Thursday! Get ready for four days of incredible music, arts, and good vibes in Oxfordshire.

angles.name: Beyond the music
angles.copy: More than just a music festival, Wilderness offers a unique escape next week with its blend of culture, wellbeing, and amazing food. Who's packing their bags?

moments.title: Camp Bestival Dorset kicks off
moments.blurb: Camp Bestival, presented by Debenhams, returns to Lulworth Castle, Dorset, from July 30th to August 2nd, with headliners including Bastille, Fatboy Slim, and Billy Ocean.

angles.name: Family festival fun
angles.copy: Camp Bestival Dorset starts next Thursday! Get ready for a family-friendly festival packed with music, fun and adventure at Lulworth Castle. Who are you taking?

angles.name: Headline acts
angles.copy: Bastille, Fatboy Slim, Billy Ocean – Camp Bestival Dorset has a massive lineup starting next week! Which act are you most excited to see?

moments.title: Y-Not Festival in Derbyshire
moments.blurb: Y-Not Festival returns to Pikehall, Derbyshire, from July 30th to August 2nd, featuring headliners like The Libertines, Reytons, Two Door Cinema Club, and The Streets.

angles.name: Indie festival in Peaks
angles.copy: Y-Not Festival kicks off next Thursday in Derbyshire! The Libertines, The Streets and more are set to rock the Peak District. Who's joining the party?

angles.name: Festival lineup
angles.copy: Getting ready for Y-Not Festival next week! With a stacked lineup, it's going to be an unforgettable weekend. What's your must-see act?

moments.title: Belladrum Tartan Heart Festival starts
moments.blurb: Belladrum Tartan Heart Festival returns to the Scottish Highlands from July 30th to August 1st, featuring James, The Human League, and Callum Beattie.

angles.name: Highlands festival
angles.copy: Belladrum Tartan Heart Festival starts next Thursday in the Highlands! James and The Human League are among the acts. Who's heading 'Bella'?

angles.name: Eclectic lineup
angles.copy: From indie anthems to synth-pop classics, Belladrum Tartan Heart Festival has an amazing lineup starting next week! What's your favourite Human League track?

moments.title: Chuck D turns 66
moments.blurb: Chuck D, the influential frontman of Public Enemy, celebrates his 66th birthday on August 1st, born in 1960.

angles.name: Hip-hop legend's birthday
angles.copy: Happy 66th birthday to the incredible Chuck D of Public Enemy this Saturday! A true pioneer of hip-hop. What's your favourite Public Enemy track?

angles.name: Influential artist
angles.copy: Still fighting the power! Chuck D celebrates his birthday this weekend. His impact on music and culture is undeniable. Which of his lyrics resonates most with you?
